code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
model.start_operation('AWARE add group with points', true)
grp = model.entities.add_group
rng = Random.new(42)
pts = []
5.times do
  p = Geom::Point3d.new(rng.rand(1000).mm, rng.rand(1000).mm, 0)
  pts << grp.entities.add_cpoint(p)
end
model.commit_operation
{ 'group_id' => grp.persistent_id.to_s, 'point_count' => pts.length }
